data.name: After creating an API Key, you can edit your Opencode configuration file at
data.value: After creating an API Key, you can edit your Opencode configuration file at

data.name: Note: Replace '{0}' or '{1}' with other available models if needed.
data.value: Note: Replace '{0}' or '{1}' with other available models if needed.

data.name: Then you can enjoy using OllamaGateway in Opencode.
data.value: Then you can enjoy using OllamaGateway in Opencode.

data.name: To ask a question in OpenAI format, use the following curl command:
data.value: To ask a question in OpenAI format, use the following curl command:

data.name: To ask a question, use the following curl command:
data.value: To ask a question, use the following curl command:

data.name: To generate embeddings for a text, use the following curl command:
data.value: To generate embeddings for a text, use the following curl command:

data.name: To simply complete a given text, use the following curl command:
data.value: To simply complete a given text, use the following curl command:

data.name: You can use this API key to access the Ollama Gateway API. The base URL is:
data.value: You can use this API key to access the Ollama Gateway API. The base URL is:
